title: Heptapleurum caroli
taxonomy: Heptapleurum caroli is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is a member of the genus Heptapleurum, which consists of evergreen trees and shrubs native to tropical regions. The Araliaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as the ginseng or ivy family. The classification of Heptapleurum caroli is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf arrangement and fruit morphology.
